args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' AND LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' AND LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%';

result.preview: [{"track_id": "4122", "title": "Street Hype", "artist": "Brucqe Maginnis", "album": "Groove City", "year": "2005"}, {"track_id": "4628", "title": "Street Hype - Groove City", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "None", "year": "'05"}, {"track_id": "14080", "title": "011-Street Hype", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "Groove City (2005)", "year": "None"}]

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' AND LOWER(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' AND LOWER(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%';

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) = 'street hype';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) = 'street hype';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

result.preview: "The store that earned the most revenue in USD from Brucqe Maginnis\u2019 song \u201cStreet Hype\u201d (across all its duplicate track records and all countries) is iTunes."

args.answer: The store that earned the most revenue in USD from Brucqe Maginnis’ song “Street Hype” (across all its duplicate track records and all countries) is iTunes.

val_args.answer: The store that earned the most revenue in USD from Brucqe Maginnis’ song “Street Hype” (across all its duplicate track records and all countries) is iTunes.
